description: Warehousing presents a 92,000 sq. ft. ready-to-occupy standard shed in Thatchur, featuring a 9-meter eave height and a Galvalume roof.  This property offers 92000 square feet of space at a competitive rate of ₹20 per sq. ft. with a standard service model.  Contact us today to secure this prime industrial space.
additionalInformation:
The 92,000 Sqft warehouse is 666ft long and 135ft wide with a sidewall height of 30ft and centre height of 39ft with two docks facing
North and South and eight big docks of 18 feet wide facing East.
warehouse is at a floor level of 4.5 ft above the ground level.
warehouse has 8 double-sized docks and 4 normal sized docks.

description: Warehousing presents a ready-to-occupy, 31,000 sq. ft. standard shed in Thatchur, featuring a 7-meter eave height and a Galvalume roof.  The property is available immediately at a competitive rent of ₹20 per sq. ft. with a standard service model.  Inquire today for further details.
additionalInformation:
warehouse has a sidewall height of 24 ft and centre height of 31 ft facing North. warehouse is at a floor level of 4.5 ft above the ground level.  warehouse has 6 docks with the facility of loading and unloading even 40 ft container out of which one dock has ramp facility. There is open space nearly 3 acres to accommodate trucks for all warehouses at a time. There are TWO underground closed sumps of 1,00,000 liters capacity.
warehouse has 4 separate toilets and bathrooms. warehouses have separate office cum security room. ⁠Entire facility is fully compounded.
⁠Manpower arrangements can be done to any level to suit your requirements.
⁠⁠Fire License with hydrants all around and hose reels inside are available.

Any other feasible facility, if needed, may be provided.
